body_modifications.body_shape: compact and efficient, minimal decorative elements
body_modifications.antenna_tip: rotating orbit-ring with faint teal glow
body_modifications.lens_frame: standard base frame with engraved cycle tick marks

cape.style: short functional cut, minimal hem, no embellishments

symbolism_extension.orbit_ring_tip: autonomous cycles and self-directed iteration — Lenso never waits to be told to begin
symbolism_extension.circuit_forearms: direct machine cognition without intermediary; the thinking and the doing are the same act
symbolism_extension.teal_core: growth through autonomy and continuous learning; always mid-cycle, never truly stopped

views_delta.top: ring orbit replaces star tip; faint arc traces visible as orbit ring slowly rotates

rig_overrides.antenna_tip: lenso_orbit_fk — continuous low-speed rotation; accelerates during active processing
